remember: Students will be able to identify and locate colonial cities in India.
Students will be able to recall the features and characteristics of colonial cities.
Students will be able to list the different types of colonial cities in India.
understand: Students will be able to explain the reasons behind the establishment of colonial cities.
Students will be able to describe the impact of colonial rule on the urban landscape of India.
Students will be able to analyze the social and economic changes brought about by colonial cities.
apply: Students will be able to evaluate the role of colonial cities in shaping India's urban experience.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the features of colonial cities with those of pre-colonial and post-colonial cities.
Students will be able to identify the challenges faced by colonial cities in the post-independence period.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between colonial cities and the growth of capitalism in India.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of colonial cities on the cultural and social identity of India.
Students will be able to identify the ways in which colonial cities contributed to the development of a modern Indian identity.

ncert_objectives: Explain the reasons behind the establishment of colonial cities.
Describe the features and characteristics of colonial cities in India.
Analyze the impact of colonial rule on the urban landscape of India.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the growth and development of colonial cities in India.
Explain the role of colonial cities in shaping India's urban experience.
Evaluate the impact of colonial cities on the social and economic changes in India.
